description: This customizable World Environment Day template has plenty of customizable space to share stories, content, goals, and ways to donate. All BEE templates are compatible with Mailchimp, Gmail, Sendgrid, Hubspot, and other email tools and platforms. Customize these templates in minutes by signing up for a free account.
